exact_quote: 317 feet ... 1-Double, 1-Surface ... Yes, 2 Terrain Park Areas ... Yes ... December to March
notes: Small community hill in Bayfield WI on Lake Superior: 317ft vert, 2 lifts (1 double + 1 surface), 2 terrain parks, tubing, Dec-Mar natural snow season. Also 40+km XC. DLH Duluth nearest commercial airport ~90mi south.

exact_quote: Mount Bohemia is set to open this weekend on Saturday, December 7, and Sunday, December 8 ... With a vertical drop of 900 feet ... Mount Bohemia has 550 acres of skiable terrain and 95 total trails ... only two chairlifts ... The mountain receives an annual snowfall average of 273 inches ... features only black and double black diamond runs
notes: Keweenaw Peninsula MI extreme/backcountry resort: 900ft vert, ~550-585 acres, 2 chairlifts + buses, 273" avg snow. Only black/double-black with 3 blue exceptions. On-mountain lodging (cabins, yurts, hostel). No terrain parks/tubing/night skiing. CMX Houghton small regional nearest.

exact_quote: We'll look forward to skiing you in 26-27
notes: Mt. Holly MI (Groveland Twp near Flint) closed for 2025-26 season after warmest winter on record in 2024-25. Plans to reopen 2026-27. Historical stats: 350ft vert, 19 trails, 7 chairlifts incl HSQ + 5 rope tows + 2 carpets. DTW Detroit nearest major airport.

exact_quote: three lifts and main chalet with concessions ... five ski jumps ... downhill runs, a tubing hill, cross-country ski trails and a biathlon course
notes: Mt. Itasca Winter Sports Center, Coleraine MN: multi-discipline area with 3 lifts (chair + POMA + rope), 5 ski jumps, alpine runs, tubing, XC trails, biathlon course. Stats limited in public sources. GPZ Grand Rapids regional nearest; DLH Duluth ~75mi east for commercial.

exact_quote: vertical drop of 432 feet ... 12 skiable acres ... 3 surface lifts (2 T-Bars and 1 Rope Tow) ... average snowfall is 75 inches ... has no snowmaking equipment ... 11 trails and glades ... December through March
notes: Tiny family ski area in Lee ME ~60mi from Bangor: 432ft vert, 12 acres, 3 surface lifts (2 T-bars + rope tow), 75" natural snow only (no snowmaking), 11 trails w/glades, Dec-Mar season. BGR Bangor nearest commercial airport.

exact_quote: 19 trails on 55 acres with a vertical drop of 240 feet ... 8 chair lifts and 2 conveyor surface lifts ... 51 inches of annual snowfall ... longest run is 2800 feet ... features 3 Terrain Parks with many different features ... Snow tubing is also available
notes: Mankato MN ski area: 240ft vert, 19 trails on 55 acres, 10 lifts (8 chairs + 2 carpets), 51" snow, 2800ft (~0.53mi) longest run, 3 terrain parks, tubing. Night skiing standard at MN community hills. MSP Minneapolis nearest major airport ~85mi NE.

exact_quote: 1 terrain park ... 1 quad chair lift, 2 double chair lifts, and 4 carpet lifts ... 13 trails ... features snowmaking on all trails ... lighted for night skiing and tubing ... full base lodge complete with cafeteria, Pete's Pub bar, and brand new rental facilities ... the oldest operating ski area in New York
notes: Mount Peter, Warwick NY (oldest operating NY ski area, 1936). 13 trails, 7 lifts (1 quad + 2 doubles + 4 carpets), 1 terrain park, 100% snowmaking, night skiing + lighted tubing, base lodge w/ Pete's Pub. ~1hr from NYC. EWR Newark nearest major airport ~50mi.

exact_quote: vertical rise is 329 feet ... six trails—one easy, two more difficult, and three most difficult ... lift is a T-bar ... 15 skiable alpine acres ... features lights for night skiing and a tubing hill ... 2025-26 SKI NY Free for Kids Passport Program
notes: Village-run rec center in Saranac Lake NY (Adirondacks): 329ft vert, 6 trails on 15 acres, single T-bar lift, lighted night skiing + tubing hill, food via ADKstreeteats. SLK Adirondack Regional Airport in town. Free for kids via SKI NY 2025-26.

exact_quote: 1,700 feet of vertical drop ... 602 Skiable Acres ... 19 Lifts ... 137 inches average annual snowfall ... Base Elevation 1,900 feet ... terrain suitable for all ability types, from gentle beginner slopes to blue cruisers and challenging black diamonds
notes: Vail-owned major southern VT resort: 1,700ft vert, 601 acres, 19 lifts (incl Bluebird Express bubble 6-pack), 137" snow, multiple terrain parks incl Carinthia park resort. On-mountain lodging at Grand Summit. ALB Albany nearest major airport ~80mi; BTV Burlington also options.

exact_quote: Mount Southington offers a 425-foot vertical drop with the base at 225 feet and the summit at 650 feet ... fourteen trails ... 2 carpet lifts, 1 handle tow, 1 double chair, and 3 triple chairs ... 100% snowmaking ... opened for the season on December 13th
notes: Plantsville CT day-skier hill: 425ft vert, 14 trails, 7 lifts (3 triples + 1 double + 1 handle + 2 carpets), 100% snowmaking, 10 new fan guns added 2025. Opened Dec 13 2025-26 season. Tubing and night skiing standard at CT areas. BDL Bradley nearest airport ~30mi north.

exact_quote: Opening day for the 2025-2026 season is December 6, 2025 ... 1,513-foot vertical drop ... 233 acres of skiable landscape ... network of 9 lifts, including two high-speed quads ... Average snowfall ... 8.2 feet (99 inches) ... advanced snowmaking system blankets 97% of the terrain
notes: Vail-owned NH state-park resort: 1,513ft vert, 233 acres, 9 lifts (incl 2 high-speed quads), 99" snow, 97% snowmaking. Dec 6 open 2025-26. Tubing (separate area) yes; no on-mountain lodging. MHT Manchester nearest commercial airport ~75mi SE.

exact_quote: Mountain Creek opened for the 2025-26 winter season on December 6, 2025 ... The opening also coincides with the resort's 60th anniversary ... The early opening follows last season's $5 million upgrade to Mountain Creek's fully automated snowmaking system ... top-to-bottom skiing at Vernon Peak, served by the Cabriolet Gondola ... two new Prinoth snow cats and 12 additional fan guns on South Peak
notes: NJ resort near NYC (Vernon): 1,040ft vert (east coast-leading for NJ), 167 acres, 9 lifts incl Cabriolet gondola, 46 trails, 65" snow + heavy snowmaking ($5M auto system 2024). Opened Dec 6 2025-26 (60th anniversary, earliest ever). Appalachian Hotel slopeside. EWR ~50mi (49.4 mi by road).

exact_quote: Mountain High opened on Saturday, November 22, 2025 ... vertical rise is 1,600 feet ... skiable terrain is 290 acres with permit terrain of 515 acres ... 14 total lifts: 2 high speed quads, 2 quad chairlifts, 2 triple chairlifts, 5 double chairlifts, and 3 moving carpets ... average annual snowfall is 117 inches (23 year average) ... night skiing returns
notes: Wrightwood CA, closest major resort to LA: 1,600ft vert, 290 (515 permit) acres, 14 lifts incl 2 HSQs, 117" snow, terrain parks + tubing + night skiing. Opened Nov 22 2025 with fresh snow. ONT Ontario nearest commercial airport ~50mi; BUR Burbank also viable.

exact_quote: Mt. Abram will officially open for the 2025–26 winter season on Saturday, December 20 ... Vertical Drop: 1150 feet ... 2 doubles, 2 surface lifts ... 40 trails (20% beginner, 52% intermediate, 28% advanced) ... 600 acres ... Snowmaking: Yes ... Night Skiing: Yes ... 3 parks
notes: Bethel ME independent family resort: 1,150ft vert, 600 acres, 4 lifts (2 doubles + 2 surface), 40 trails, 3 terrain parks, night skiing, snowmaking. Dec 20 open 2025-26. PWM Portland nearest major commercial airport ~75mi south.

exact_quote: Mt. Bachelor planned to open for the 2025/26 winter season on Tuesday, December 23 ... vertical drop of 3,365 feet ... 101 trails served by 12 lifts across 4,318 skiable acres ... averaging 462 inches of snow per year ... one of the snowiest resorts in the United States
notes: Major Oregon volcano resort (Bend): 3,365ft vert, 4,318 acres (top-10 US largest), 12 lifts, 101 trails, 462" snow average. Dec 23 open 2025-26 (latest in 30yrs due to warm/wet weather). Tubing park separate. RDM Redmond nearest commercial airport ~22mi NE.

exact_quote: vertical drop of 1,500 feet ... 1,000 skiable acres ... 10 lifts, eight of which are quad chairlifts ... averages 688 inches of snowfall each season ... winter of 1998-99 record of 1,140 inches of snowfall, an all-time record for most snowfall at any ski resort on the planet
notes: WA legendary snow magnet: 1,500ft vert, 1,000 acres, 10 lifts (8 quads), 688" snowfall average (world-record 1,140" in 98-99). Mid Dec open dependent on snow (lots of natural). BLI Bellingham nearest commercial airport ~55mi west. No tubing/night.

exact_quote: Opening day for the winter 2025-2026 season is scheduled for December 13, 2025 ... 2,100 feet vertical drop, with a 6,500 feet base elevation and 8,600 feet summit elevation ... four chairlifts serve over 800 acres of diverse terrain ... Thunder Mountain Express (Chair 1) ... average annual snowfall of 170 inches ... season closing day is April 13, 2026
notes: Mt. Baldy Resort, San Gabriels CA, closest mountain to LA: 2,100ft vert (top-15 US), 800 acres, 4 chairlifts, ~170" snow. Dec 13 - Apr 13 2025-26. Famously steep/expert (54% advanced). ONT Ontario nearest commercial airport ~30mi south.

exact_quote: Mt. Brighton opened Saturday for the ski season ... with the ski resort remaining open through March 8 ... 26 slopes and 12 lifts ... 25 trails and five lifts covering 130 acres
notes: Vail-owned Detroit-area teaching hill: ~230ft vert, 130 acres, 12 lifts (incl multiple HSQ + carpets), 26 trails. Opened Dec 6 2025-26, closes Mar 8. Night skiing standard, terrain park, no tubing. DTW Detroit Metro nearest airport ~50mi south.

exact_quote: 11 runs ranging from easy to expert ... 4 lifts including 2 handle tows, 1 double chair, and 1 quad chair ... 100% snowmaking coverage ... ski season runs from early December well into March ... 40 skiable acres with a base elevation of 1,200 feet and summit elevation of 1,500 feet, and the longest run is 2,200 feet
notes: Mt. Crescent (now Crescent Hill at Hitchcock), Honey Creek IA: 300ft vert, 40 acres, 11 runs, 4 lifts (1 quad + 1 double + 2 handle tows), 100% snowmaking, 2,200ft (~0.42mi) longest run. Tubing and night skiing standard. OMA Omaha nearest airport ~25mi SW across river.

exact_quote: base elevation is 400 feet, rising to 1200 feet at the top of the single lift, for a vertical drop of 800 feet ... historic 1939 American Steel and Wire single chair lift ... rope tow on the beginner slope ... oldest working chairlift in North America ... annual snowfall averages 350" ... operates from December through April on weekends, holidays and powder days
notes: Mt. Eyak, Cordova AK: 800ft vert, 2 lifts (1939 single chair-oldest working chair in N. America + rope tow), 350" snowfall, Dec-Apr weekends/holidays/powder days. ~30 trail options. Indy Pass partner. CDV Cordova airport in town.

exact_quote: Since 1949, Mt. Holiday has provided affordable skiing for families in the Grand Traverse area ... 16 runs, beginner to advanced ... two chairlifts ... snow tubing with express return lift ... new 10-station zipline
notes: Non-profit community ski hill Traverse City MI since 1949: 16 runs, 2 chairlifts, tubing w/ express return lift, year-round (zipline summer). TVC Cherry Capital airport in Traverse City <10mi. Limited public stats for vert/acres/snowfall.

exact_quote: Mt. Hood Meadows officially opens for the 2025 ski season on Tuesday, December 23 ... latest opening day in 30 years ... Vertical Drop: 2,777 feet ... Skiable Acres: 2,150 acres ... 12 lifts ... 87 runs ... Mt. Hood Meadows receives a whopping 430 inches of snowfall in an average year
notes: Mt. Hood OR major resort: 2,777ft vert (top US for the volcano), 2,150 acres, 12 lifts, 87+ runs (142 historical), 430" snow. Dec 23 open 2025-26 (record-latest). Night skiing yes. PDX Portland nearest major commercial airport ~70mi west via US-26.

exact_quote: Ski Bowl's 960 acres of terrain cater to every skill level, with 65 runs total and a vertical drop of 1,500 feet ... network of 9 lifts ... America's Largest Night Ski Area, featuring 34 fully lit night runs ... average annual snowfall of 300 inches ... most accessible major ski area from Portland, located just 53 miles from the city
notes: Mt. Hood Skibowl, Government Camp OR: 1,500ft vert, 960 acres, 9 lifts, 65 runs, 300" snow. America's Largest Night Ski Area (34 lit runs). Tubing, snow play. Late Nov-Apr typical. PDX Portland nearest major airport ~53mi west.

exact_quote: 516-foot vertical drop ... 19 trails spread across 100 acres ... Mileaway, the longest run in Wisconsin, and Damnation, the steepest trail in Mid-America ... three double chair lifts and a moving carpet ... approximately 19 inches of annual snowfall ... 100-percent snowmaking coverage ... 2025-26 ski season runs from December 5, 2025 through March 8, 2026 ... night skiing
notes: Mt. La Crosse WI: 516ft vert, 100 acres, 4 lifts (3 doubles + carpet), 19 trails incl Wisconsin's longest run 'Mileaway' and steepest Mid-America 'Damnation', 19" natural + 100% snowmaking. Dec 5 2025 - Mar 8 2026 season. Night skiing. Indy Pass. LSE La Crosse Regional airport ~10mi.

exact_quote: Opening day for the winter 2025-2026 season is scheduled for December 14, 2025 ... 950-foot vertical drop from the summit to the 8,200-foot base ... 200 acres across 22 runs ... Three lifts ... two double chairlifts and one surface lift ... summit receives an average of approximately 180 inches of snowfall annually ... 2025/26 season runs December 14 to February 27 ... no snowmaking equipment
notes: America's southernmost ski area on Mt. Lemmon AZ near Tucson: 950ft vert, 200 acres, 22 runs, 3 lifts (2 doubles + surface), 180" snow at summit, NO snowmaking. Dec 14 - Feb 27 2025-26 (snow-dependent). TUS Tucson nearest airport ~35mi south via Catalina Hwy.

exact_quote: Mt. Rose Ski Tahoe, Nevada, opened for skiing and riding on Friday, November 21, 2025 ... first Tahoe Area Resort to Open for the 2025-26 Winter Season ... over 1,200 acres of terrain with a vertical drop of over 1,800 vertical feet ... base elevation of the resort is 8,260 feet and the summit is 9,700 feet ... 70 trails ... 8 lifts ... average yearly snowfall for Mount Rose is 350 inches
notes: Mt. Rose Ski Tahoe NV: 1,800ft vert, 1,200 acres, 8 lifts, 70+ trails, 350" snow, 8,260ft highest base in Tahoe. First Tahoe resort open 2025-26 (Nov 21). Famous Chutes expert terrain. RNO Reno nearest commercial airport ~25mi NE.

exact_quote: Opening day for the winter 2025-2026 season is scheduled for December 19, 2025 ... 635 acres ... 4 lifts ... 3 triple chairlifts running to the top of Coyote Butte, Douglas Butte, and Marmot Ridge, and 1 quad chairlift on Grey Butte, along with 2 magic carpets ... summits range from Marmot Ridge at 6,150 feet to Grey Butte at 7,536 feet, with a base elevation of 5,500 feet ... average annual snowfall of 275 inches

Dec 19 open 2025-26. RDD Redding nearest commercial airport ~60mi SW. NOTE: same physical resort as 'mt-shasta-ski-park' slug below.

exact_quote: Vertical Drop: 1,000 ft ... 150 acres ... Three double chairlifts ... 130 in (inches per year) ... season usually starts in January and can go to April ... no snowmaking equipment ... rely on Mother Nature
notes: Mt. Waterman, San Gabriel Mountains CA (Angeles National Forest): 1,000ft vert, 150-210 acres, 3 double chairs, 130" natural snow only (NO snowmaking), Jan-Apr typical (very snow-dependent). Recovered post-Bobcat Fire 2020. BUR Burbank nearest commercial airport ~40mi south.
